payload.answer: Compiled durable architecture decisions and open questions from the Brain Architecture summary.
citations: Brain DB should be the source of truth.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection.
Slack should be a strict memory intake agent.
Open questions: Should Telegram be added later? Which model is cheapest while saturating performance?

entity_resolution.reason: The summary refers to a coherent Brain architecture context but provides no existing entity identifiers; create or update entities by canonical names while preserving open questions.

memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth for the Brain personal memory system.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection of Brain DB.
Slack should be a strict memory intake agent for the Brain personal memory system.
It is undecided whether Telegram should be added later as part of the Brain personal memory system architecture.
It is undecided which model is cheapest while saturating performance for the Brain personal memory system.

details: Committed Brain DB as source of truth.
Committed Cognee as rebuildable semantic projection.
Committed Slack as strict memory intake agent.
Preserved Telegram and model-selection items as open questions, not current decisions.
